user.title: Set up Alexa Announcement Builder
user.description: Create the integration entry to enable the Alexa Announcement Builder action. No account credentials or device selection are required.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Alexa Announcement Builder is already configured.

send.name: Send Alexa announcement
send.description: Build an ordered Alexa SSML sequence and send it through a notify entity.

target.name: Target
target.description: Alexa Devices Speak or Announce notify entity. A sequence containing Sound requires a Speak target.

sequence.name: Sequence
sequence.description: Each item requires a Content type and its matching field. Other fields are ignored. Drag items to set playback order. Maximum five audio clips.

break_before_ms.name: Break before
break_before_ms.description: Silent break before the complete sequence, in milliseconds.

break_after_ms.name: Break after
break_after_ms.description: Silent break after the complete sequence, in milliseconds.
